name: Understand-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Lum1104 /

      Understand-Anything  

    
      Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
summary: 该项目能将任意代码转化为可交互、可搜索的知识图谱，并支持通过自然语言提问，因其与主流AI编程工具深度集成，显著提升代码理解与调试效率。

name: rohitg00
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      ai-engineering-from-scratch  

    
      Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
summary: 该项目是一个从零开始学习并构建AI工程的开源教程，涵盖从基础到落地的完整流程，适合希望系统掌握AI工程实践的开发者。

name: pi
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        earendil-works /

      pi  

    
      AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
summary: 该项目是一个AI代理工具包，提供编码代理命令行、统一LLM接口、终端/网页UI库、Slack机器人及vLLM集群管理功能；它整合了多种AI开发工具，值得关注是因为能显著提升LLM应用的开发与部署效率。

name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: CodeGraph 是一个为 Claude Code、Codex 等 AI 编程工具预建索引的本地代码知识图谱，能显著减少 token 消耗和工具调用次数，值得关注因为它大幅提升 AI 编码效率且完全本地运行。

name: mukul975
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mukul975 /

      Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills  

    
      754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
summary: 该项目提供了754个结构化的网络安全技能，映射到MITRE ATT&CK等五大框架，支持Claude Code、GitHub Copilot等20多个AI平台，是构建AI安全代理的标准化技能库，值得关注。

name: multica
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        multica-ai /

      multica  

    
      The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
summary: Multica 是一个开源的管理型 AI 智能体平台，能将编码智能体转变为真正的团队成员，支持分配任务、跟踪进度和积累技能，值得关注因为它让多个 AI 智能体像人类团队一样协作工作。

name: build-your-own-x
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        codecrafters-io /

      build-your-own-x  

    
      Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
summary: 该项目是一个汇集了从零构建各类技术（如操作系统、数据库、Git等）的教程集合，因其实战性强、能深度理解底层原理而备受开发者关注。

name: free-claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Alishahryar1 /

      free-claude-code  

    
      Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
summary: 该项目提供免费使用Claude Code的终端、VSCode扩展和Discord集成方案，支持语音功能，值得关注是因为它让用户无需付费即可体验Claude的代码能力。
